message:
prompt: add TDD, systematic debugging, and planning discipline

Distill key engineering principles from superpowers skills into the
base system prompt to address "close but wrong" benchmark failures
where the agent gets 60-90% done and stops early.

- TDD: iron law, red-green-refactor dot graph, tests-first discipline,
  debugging integration (write failing test before fixing bugs),
  anti-mock guidance
- Systematic debugging: iron law, pattern analysis phase (find working
  examples and compare), write failing test before fixing, 3-strike
  architectural escalation, all encoded as dot graph
- Planning: understand-before-building gate, explore codebase first,
  consider 2-3 approaches, identify exact file paths
- Subagent: fresh subagent per task, verify output against spec

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
